integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Student: Brandon Lee (11th grade, DOB: 2006-09-30). Courses to verify: STAT101 (AP Statistics, Math, 1.0 credits), WRIT101 (Creative Writing, English, 1.0 credits), CIVIC101 (Civics, Social Studies, 0.5 credits), PHOTO101 (Photography, Arts, 0.5 credits).
